headline: A Look At Smurfit Westrock (SW) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Why Smurfit Westrock (SW) is on investor watchlists Smurfit Westrock (SW) has recently drawn attention after a period of mixed share performance, including a 2.1% decline over the past day and an 8.3% decline over the past month. At a last close of $39.29 and a market value of about $20.5b, the packaging group combines annual revenue of $31.2b with reported net income of $699m, along with modest annual growth in both measures.
